title: MCQ
description: A multiple choice question with stimulus and per-choice explanations

type.description: text = passage; table = {headers, rows}; chart = Chart.js config; code = College Board pseudocode (CSP only); none = no stimulus

content.description: String for text/code; {headers: string[], rows: string[][]} for table; Chart.js ChartConfiguration object for chart; null/omit for none

id.description: Canonical ID. Choices stored in A/B/C/D order in JSON — scrambled at render time only

explanation.description: Why this choice is correct (1-2 sentences) or specifically wrong (1 sentence). Never vague.

unit_objective.description: CED learning objective code or description this question covers (e.g. 'PSY-1.A.1')

calculator_allowed.description: Whether a graphing calculator is permitted for this question (math subjects only)
